# Cortical-Only Seizure Control: A Computational Framework for Epilepsy Treatment via N1 Brain-Computer Interface

**Authors:** BrainWire Research Group (Park, Min Woo)

**Date:** March 2026

**Status:** Draft v1.0

---

## Abstract

Epilepsy affects approximately 50 million people worldwide, with 30% of cases resistant to pharmacological treatment. Current responsive neurostimulation systems --- most notably the NeuroPace RNS --- employ 4 electrode contacts with approximately 160 ms detection l
